batchLimit.serverEnforcedMessage: You've reached the processing limit for your plan. You processed <currentCount>{currentCountValue}</currentCount> images, but your plan allows a maximum of <limit>{limitValue}</limit> images per hour.
batchLimit.clientEnforcedMessage: You tried to add {attempted} image{plural, plural, one {} other {s}}, but your plan allows a maximum of {limit} image{limitPlural, plural, one {} other {s}} in the queue.
batchLimit.freeUserMessage: You're on the free tier (1 image at a time). Upgrade to process up to 50 images in batch — starting at $5.
batchLimit.remainingSlotsMessage: You have {availableSlots} of {limit} slots remaining in your queue.
batchLimit.securityMessage: This is a security measure to prevent abuse. The limit will reset in approximately 1 hour. Upgrade your plan for higher limits.
batchLimit.body_value: Get 50 credits for just $4.99 — batch process, pro AI models, 4K output.
batchLimit.body_outcome: See the difference pro AI models make. Sharper details, cleaner edges, up to 4K resolution.
batchLimit.body_urgency: Start batch processing now. Pro AI models included.

customInstructions.title: Custom Instructions

customInstructions.templateLoadedDescription: A sample template has been loaded above. Feel free to modify it or replace it with your own instructions.
customInstructions.placeholderPrompt: Tell the AI exactly how to process your image...

oversizedImage.autoResizeToPixelLimit: Automatically resize to fit within {maxPixels}MP pixel limit.
